note: one three-fixture smoke — NOT model approval and NOT promotion-ready

fixtures.goal: Validate that the public 'Trusted by 5,000 teams' claim is reachable and accurately reported.

budgetNote: 5 of 6 paid calls used across 4 checkpointed sessions (1+1+1+2); the 6th was deliberately withheld to stay within the hard cap. This JSON is the FINAL session — architect verified end-to-end, critic blocked on strict parse.

iterationHistory.result: architect OK (candidateCount 1, groundingValid 1, state_seen 1); critic strict_parse_error (llm_strict_not_object)

keyFindings: The grounded architect (gemini-3.1-flash-lite) produces strict-valid, digest-grounded, state_seen missions live once the prompt teaches the exact contract. Four prompt/schema-consistency defects were found and fixed: the example JSON omitted the required evidenceIndex; the riskCategory enum and effortMinutes range were unstated; optional fields (transitionRef, conditions/assumptions/disallowed) were emitted as null and were not null-tolerant.

The strict raw parser + Zod correctly REJECTED every non-conforming output (4 architect misses across sessions 1-3, 1 critic miss in session 4). The reject-never-repair safety machinery works exactly as designed.

The critic (claude-haiku-4-5 via CommonStack) returned a non-bare-object (fenced/prose) that the STRICT critic parse refuses to salvage (llm_strict_not_object). Bare-JSON output is not honored for this model through the gateway, unlike gemini. Resolving this (bare-JSON enforcement at the gateway, a different critic model, or a critic-parse-policy decision) is DEFERRED — not this sprint, and NOT a model approval.
